step_by_step_reasoning: The transcript describes a system where mobile users send lyrics synchronization feedback to a legacy containerized platform on EC2 (backed by Aurora and Couchbase). This feedback generates tasks saved in DynamoDB. AWS Fargate (via streaming service charts) and AWS Redshift (analytics rank) prioritize these tasks. AWS AppSync then distributes tasks to curators/internal users. Upon task completion, AWS Lambda is triggered to handle complex writes to DynamoDB and publish the updated lyrics back to the legacy system.

graph.name: Musixmatch Lyrics Crowd-Sourcing and Synchronization Platform
graph.notes: Architected to ingest continuous lyrics synchronization feedback from mobile apps and orchestrate curation tasks among curators, experts, and internal operators using AWS AppSync and DynamoDB.

nodes.name: Mobile App Users
nodes.notes: Provide direct and indirect feedback on lyrics sync quality.

nodes.name: Legacy Backend
nodes.notes: Docker-based API servers managing application logic and publishing lyrics.

nodes.name: Couchbase DB
nodes.notes: Self-hosted NoSQL cluster holding user-generated data.

nodes.name: Tasks DynamoDB
nodes.notes: Central registry holding tasks needing curation or validation.

nodes.name: AWS AppSync
nodes.notes: Distributes task status and synchronization data to curators in real-time.

nodes.name: Curators and Experts
nodes.notes: Review, edit, and sync lyrics based on received tasks.

nodes.name: Fargate Prioritization Jobs
nodes.notes: Runs batch jobs pulling music streaming charts to prioritize tasks.

nodes.name: AWS Redshift Analytics
nodes.notes: Calculates content ranks per country to help prioritize tasks.

nodes.name: Submission Orchestrator
nodes.notes: Handles complex multi-write transactions and publishes completed content.

edges.notes: Returns confirmation back to mobile user.
Updates task priority based on external streaming charts.
Injects priority ranks derived from country-specific analysis.
Triggers complex orchestration for task completion.
Publishes updated lyrics into production database.
